topics.title: Neural Bases of Language and Cognition
topics.description: This cluster centers on fMRI studies of how the human brain supports language, speech, attention, comprehension, and related cognitive functions. It also includes work on neural representations, decoding, and predictive coding across tasks such as visual imagery and action observation.

topics.title: Dynamic Connectivity Across Brain States and Individuals
topics.description: This cluster centers on how functional and dynamic connectivity relate to brain states, individual variability, and structure-function relationships across rest and task conditions. It also touches on lifespan and disease-related differences in brain network organization.

topics.title: Transdiagnostic Psychiatric Imaging Biomarkers
topics.description: This cluster centers on psychiatric disorders across diagnostic categories, especially schizophrenia, depression, bipolar disorder, PTSD, and obsessive compulsive disorder. It emphasizes transdiagnostic psychopathology and brain imaging biomarkers in early psychosis and related spectrum conditions.

topics.title: Alzheimer Continuum and Cognitive Decline
topics.description: This cluster centers on Alzheimer disease and related stages across the cognitive spectrum, from preclinical and subjective decline to mild cognitive impairment. It highlights biomarker and pathology links, including amyloid and tau, in broader neurodegenerative and aging contexts.

topics.title: Neurodevelopmental Disorders Across Youth
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurodevelopmental and psychiatric conditions emerging across childhood and adolescence, with emphasis on autism, ADHD, depression, and psychosis. It also highlights developmental brain changes and functional connectivity patterns associated with symptoms and risk.

topics.title: Neuromodulation Treatments for Psychiatric Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on brain stimulation and related neuromodulation approaches for psychiatric and neuropsychiatric conditions, especially depression, OCD, anxiety, and treatment-resistant illness. It also includes studies linking stimulation outcomes to functional connectivity and other neuroimaging measures.

topics.title: Deep Learning for Brain MRI Segmentation
topics.description: This cluster centers on deep learning methods for brain MRI analysis, especially automated segmentation and related 3D convolutional models. It also emphasizes robustness, reproducibility, and practical utility across neuroimaging workflows.

topics.title: Neural Mechanisms of Emotion Regulation
topics.description: This cluster centers on how the brain supports emotion regulation, including amygdala and prefrontal contributions, cognitive reappraisal, and related neural correlates. It also touches on affective processing, anxiety, empathy, and individual differences across development and stress.

topics.title: High-Resolution fMRI Methods and Responses
topics.description: This cluster centers on high-field fMRI and related MRI approaches for mapping brain function and vascular responses in humans and mice. It emphasizes resolution, reliability, motion/artifact control, and measures such as BOLD sensitivity and cerebrovascular reactivity.

topics.title: Preterm Birth and Brain Development Outcomes
topics.description: This cluster focuses on brain development and cognitive outcomes in preterm infants and neonates across childhood and adolescence. It emphasizes developmental trajectories and normative brain development in relation to early birth.

topics.title: Sleep, Alpha Rhythms, and Brain Arousal
topics.description: This cluster centers on neural dynamics of sleep and consciousness, especially alpha oscillations and aperiodic EEG activity. It also spans individual differences, cognition, and fMRI-linked brain state changes.

topics.title: Lesion-Linked Recovery and Cognitive Deficits
topics.description: This cluster centers on stroke and traumatic brain injury studies examining how lesions and network alterations relate to aphasia, motor outcome, and cognitive impairment. It emphasizes functional recovery and predictive links between brain injury and language or cognition.

topics.title: Brain Age and Aging in Neurodegeneration
topics.description: This cluster centers on brain age estimation and normative modeling as tools for characterizing aging-related differences in the human brain. The abstracts emphasize accelerated brain aging, cortical thickness, and links to neurodegeneration and broader brain health across the lifespan.

topics.title: Prodromal Parkinson and Lewy Body Disease
topics.description: The cluster centers on Parkinson disease and related Lewy body disorders, especially prodromal states and clinical progression to cognitive and autonomic impairment. It also highlights hallmark pathology and symptoms such as alpha synuclein pathology, substantia nigra involvement, visual hallucinations, and phenoconversion.

keywords: constrained dynamic functional connectivity predicts surgical outcome
topics.title: Epilepsy Localization and Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on epilepsy subtypes, especially temporal lobe and focal epilepsy, and the identification of epileptogenic and seizure onset zones. It also highlights intracranial recording, connectivity analysis, and predictive markers for surgical outcome.

topics.title: Aging, Memory, and Brain Network Changes
topics.description: This cluster centers on age-related changes in memory and brain organization across the adult lifespan, with emphasis on healthy aging and older adults. It also includes sex differences and cerebellar network findings relevant to cognitive aging.

topics.title: Multiscale Human Brain Mapping and Dynamics
topics.description: The cluster centers on multiscale characterization of the human brain using high-field MRI, PET, atlases, and histological frameworks. It emphasizes cortical organization, structural and dynamical gradients, and comparative mapping across resolutions and coordinate systems.

topics.title: Open Neuroimaging Infrastructure and Workflows
topics.description: This cluster centers on open, collaborative neuroimaging infrastructure for organizing, converting, visualizing, and processing brain imaging data. It emphasizes BIDS-based workflows, Cbrain integration, and automation to support reproducible clinical and research use.

topics.title: Neural Mechanisms of Pain and Sensory Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on chronic pain and related sensory disorders, including fibromyalgia, trigeminal neuralgia, tinnitus, and misophonia. The abstracts emphasize brain mechanisms, markers, and connectivity pathways linked to pain perception, central sensitization, and fear-avoidance processes.

keywords: lsd reshapes cortical dynamics through peak frequency shifts
topics.title: Psychedelic Effects on Brain Dynamics
topics.description: This cluster centers on how psychedelics and related drugs alter brain network organization, connectivity, and cortical dynamics, often using resting-state EEG, modeling, and network analyses. It includes work on psilocybin, ketamine, and LSD, with emphasis on entropy, microstates, and large-scale neural dynamics.

topics.title: Adult White Matter in Developmental Language Disorder
topics.description: This cluster focuses on white matter differences associated with developmental language disorder in adults. It appears to center on neuroanatomical findings related to language impairment across development.

keywords: benchmark evaluation of functional templates for group level
topics.title: Functional Template Benchmarking in fMRI Decoding
topics.description: This cluster focuses on evaluating functional templates for group-level fMRI task decoding. It centers on benchmark comparisons of template-based approaches in neuroscience analysis.

topics.title: Hypersexuality in Neurological Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on hypersexuality as it relates to neurological disorders. The abstracts appear to synthesize evidence through systematic review.
